title: Flowable CMMN API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from the Flowable CMMN OpenAPI specification

description.example: This is a case for testing purposes

resource.description: Contains the actual deployed CMMN 1.1 xml.

diagramResource.description: Contains a graphical representation of the case, null when no diagram is available.

graphicalNotationDefined.description: Indicates the case definition contains graphical information (CMMN DI).

CaseInstanceCreateRequest.description: Only one of caseDefinitionId or caseDefinitionKey can be used in the request body

activatePlanItemDefinitionIds.description: plan item definition ids to be activated

moveToAvailablePlanItemDefinitionIds.description: plan item definition ids to be moved to available state

terminatePlanItemDefinitionIds.description: plan item definition ids to be terminated

addWaitingForRepetitionPlanItemDefinitio.description: add waiting for repetition to provided plan item definition ids

removeWaitingForRepetitionPlanItemDefini.description: remove waiting for repetition to provided plan item definition ids

changePlanItemIds.description: map an existing plan item id to new plan item id, this should not be necessary in general, but could be needed when plan item ids change between case definition versions.

changePlanItemIdsWithDefinitionId.description: map an existing plan item id to new plan item id with the plan item definition id, this should not be necessary in general, but could be needed when plan item ids change between case definition versions.

changePlanItemDefinitionsWithNewTargetId.description: map an existing plan item id to a new plan item id and plan item definition id, this should not be necessary in general, but could be needed when plan item ids change between case definition versions.

url.description: For a single resource contains the actual URL to use for retrieving the binary resource

mediaType.description: Contains the media-type the resource has. This is resolved using a (pluggable) MediaTypeResolver and contains, by default, a limited number of mime-type mappings.

action.description: Action to perform: Either complete, claim, delegate or resolve

assignee.description: If action is claim or delegate, you can use this parameter to set the assignee associated

formDefinitionId.description: Required when completing a task with a form

outcome.description: Optional outcome value when completing a task with a form

variables.description: If action is complete, you can use this parameter to set variables

transientVariables.description: If action is complete, you can use this parameter to set transient variables

delegationState.description: Delegation-state of the task, can be null, "pending" or "resolved".
